zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Danvers於大約1449年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯時，她的父親Richard Danvers41歲，母親Elizabeth Euphemia Langston18歲。她於大約1470年與Thomas Englefield結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和15個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1510年在英國英格蘭波克夏恩格利費爾德享年63歲，埋葬在英國波克夏恩格利費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Danvers于大约1449年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯时，她的父亲Richard Danvers41岁，母亲Elizabeth Euphemia Langston18岁。她于大约1470年与Thomas Englefield结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和15个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1510年在英国英格兰波克夏恩格利費爾德享年63岁，埋葬在英国波克夏恩格利費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Danvers was born about 1449, in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Danvers, was 41 and her mother, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, was 18. She married Thomas Englefield about 1470. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 15 daughters. She died about 1510, in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63, and was buried in Englefield, Berkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Danvers est née environ 1449, à Culworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Danvers, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Englefield environ 1470. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 15 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1510, à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterrée à Englefield, Berkshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Danvers um 1449 in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Danvers 41 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Euphemia Langston 18. Sie hat um 1470 Thomas Englefield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 15 Töchter. Sie starb um 1510 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Englefield, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Englefield, Berkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Danvers è nata il circa 1449 nel Culworth, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Richard Danvers, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Englefield circa 1470. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 15 figlie. Morì circa 1510, nel Englefield, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolta a Englefield, Berkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Danversが約1449年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクウルウオルスで生まれた時，父Richard Danversは41歳，母Elizabeth Euphemia Langstonは18歳であった。約1470年にThomas Englefieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と15人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1510年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドで63歳で死去し，イギリスバークシュアイアエングレフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Danvers(이)가 대략 1449년 영국 노르섬프토실르 컬워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Danvers(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Euphemia Langston(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1470년 Thomas Englefield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 잉글레필드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 버크실르 잉글레필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Danvers nasceu aproximadamente 1449, em Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Danvers, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Englefield aproximadamente 1470. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 15 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1510, em Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos, e foi sepultada em Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Danvers родилась около 1449 г. в местности кулворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Danvers было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Englefield около 1470 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 15 дочерей. Она умерла около 1510 г. в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет и была похоронена в местности энглефиелд, биркшир, Англия.

sm.about 1449–Abt. 1510: e tusa o le 1449–e tusa o le 1510

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Danvers nació aproximadamente 1449, en Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Danvers, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Euphemia Langston, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Thomas Englefield aproximadamente 1470. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 15 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1510, en Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultada en Englefield, Berkshire, Inglaterra.
